positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page with a visible session indicator
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is redirected to the home/dashboard page
Verify the authenticated user's name or profile indicator is visible on the page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session persists after page refresh and the user remains authenticated on the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Refresh the browser page (F5 or browser refresh)
Verify the user remains logged in and is not redirected back to the login page
Verify the dashboard/home page content is still displayed
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login and verify session persistence on page refresh

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Password toggle works correctly, and the user is successfully logged in after clicking the Login button
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify the password characters are masked by default (shown as dots or asterisks)
Click the show/hide password toggle icon (eye icon) if available
Verify the password text is now visible in plain text
Click the toggle again to re-mask the password
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is successfully logged in and redirected to the dashboard/home page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with password visibility toggle (show/hide password)

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged out, session is terminated, and the login page is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Locate and click the Logout button or option (e.g., via profile menu or navigation bar)
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page
Verify the login form is displayed and no authenticated session is active
positive_scenarios.title: Successful logout after login

positive_scenarios.expected_result: An already-authenticated user attempting to visit the login page is automatically redirected to the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Manually navigate back to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login in the browser address bar
Verify the application automatically redirects the already-authenticated user away from the login page to the dashboard/home page
positive_scenarios.title: Login page redirects authenticated user away from login page

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Login form is submitted via Enter key and user is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Press the Enter key on the keyboard while focused on the password field
Verify the login form is submitted
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Verify authenticated user content is displayed
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login using keyboard Enter key instead of clicking Login button

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Form submission is blocked and validation error messages are displayed for both empty username and password fields
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the username/email field empty
Leave the password field empty
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the form is not submitted
Verify appropriate validation error messages are displayed (e.g., 'Email is required', 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and empty password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Authentication fails, user remains on the login page, and a generic invalid credentials error message is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter an incorrect password (e.g., 'WrongPassword123!') in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid username or password' or 'Incorrect credentials')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username and incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is blocked due to invalid email format and an appropriate validation error message is shown
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter an invalid email format (e.g., 'testd1051gmail.com') in the username/email field
Enter any password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the form is not submitted or an error is returned
Verify a validation error message is displayed (e.g., 'Please enter a valid email address')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid email format in username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Form submission is blocked and an error message indicating the username/email field is required is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the username/email field completely empty
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the form is not submitted
Verify a validation error message is displayed for the username field (e.g., 'Email is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and valid password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Form submission is blocked and an error message indicating the password field is required is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Leave the password field completely empty
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the form is not submitted
Verify a validation error message is displayed for the password field (e.g., 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username and empty password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Authentication fails, user remains on the login page, and a generic error message is displayed that does not expose whether the email is registered
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter a non-existent email address (e.g., 'nonexistent_user_xyz@gmail.com') in the username/email field
Enter any password (e.g., 'TestPassword123!') in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid username or password') without revealing whether the email exists
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with non-existent/unregistered email address

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application safely handles the SQL injection input, does not grant unauthorized access, and displays a standard error message without exposing system details
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter a SQL injection string (e.g., "' OR '1'='1") in the username/email field
Enter any value (e.g., 'password') in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is NOT authenticated or granted access
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed and no database errors or stack traces are exposed
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with SQL injection in username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Whitespace-only input is treated as empty or invalid, form submission is blocked or rejected, and an appropriate error message is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter only whitespace characters (e.g., multiple spaces) in the username/email field
Enter only whitespace characters in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the form is not submitted or the request is rejected
Verify an appropriate validation error message is displayed (e.g., 'Email is required' or 'Invalid credentials')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with whitespace-only entries in username and password fields
